reviews.review_description: Honestly I was expecting a lot more from this game but the only thing available was the duel and that got annoying incredibly quickly, definitely not worth my time. I did enjoy handling a firelock pistol
It seems like the updates are really slow.

Tried it and I am sitting, there is zero settings to use sitting mode, did the duel several times and failed as I wasn’t standing tall enough, as soon as I stood up it worked perfectly for every duel… there needs to be a setting to play in sitdown as ppsted on the page
Every time i keep trying to pass the duel on the very first start, it won't kill the stupid enemy, this game was a waste of time for insanity

Pretty cool, though it would be better if the loading procedure was correct. Power, patch, ball, pan. Definitely some room for improvement and new weapons. I would like to see the Brown Bess or the Kentucky Long Rifle.
In the beginning when this came out they had slots for new things, but sadly it's just the same old same thing. It has room for potential would love to see it grow more.

I personally have to admit, this game has so much potential that I believe the devs don't seem to understand. We could have an amazing American Revolutionary War multi-player game out of this, and it would most likely be a top-tier vr game, it certainly can be worked on since it is very janky, but this can this game is so fun to play at times to where I wouldn't even mind. Devs, if you are reading this, please add both a story and a multiplayer.
This game is cool. You should make another where you fight with musket and swords, and it takes place in the American Revolutionary War. That would be cool game to play.
Amazing game but needs updates
Not much to do after 5 minutes
Its really cool loading a Flintlock, but Jesus the physics are terrible.
I hate this game way too confusing and I cant even get past the tutorial I hate this bs
About as fun as dueling with flintlocks gets

I was having doubts getting this but when i did i was blown away. 101% consider getting. Please at more levels tho.
Love this game🤩
I love the way this game is going. it has a lot of potential!
The game is good but when are they gonna release the wood notching? I’m excited for that but I really need to know when the update comes out

Its more of an experience than a game its fun but boring on the draw, if u shoot to early you fail wirh no honour or too late and you die lol but fun to learn how to fire and load an old gun with powder even tho the pouring of the gunpowder never fills the dish the way u need it to lol, would love to try the other activities except the dancing one lol got enough dancing games n apps dont need to learn to dance just do a fun hands on experience learning to smithy would be more ideal than learning to dance...

Awesome game I love I remember shooting a flint lock in the fields with my coach and this really brings back memories 
It’s just needs more guns like muskets and blunderbusses
The game is fun but it needs more like maybe muskets or adding the other game modes but for a free game it is fun if your interested in old guns but it only has a flintlock at the moment

reviews.review_title: How do you stop losing your ramrod
reviews.review_description: When I use my ramrod and I drop it doesn’t f***comeback and it gets stuck to the gun
